title: saxifraga × polita
intro: Saxifraga × polita, also known as the rock saxifrage or polyantha rock saxifrage, is a hybrid plant in the saxifrage family, Saxifragaceae, created by crossing Saxifraga oppositifolia with Saxifraga tridactylites. Traditionally, Saxifraga × polita has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant has been associated with various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and potentially lowering blood pressure. Saxifraga × polita can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, often in combination with other herbs, to enhance its therapeutic effects.
